channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: From 47 to 75 Commits: How a Single _headers File Broke My Brain (and My App) for 8 Hours
item.description: The 8-Hour "Please Work" Marathon We’ve all been there. You have a vision. You want to build a completely free, local-first, privacy-respecting PWA toolkit (NeatKit). Everything is running...

item.title: Quantum Teleportation, and Why It Isn't Cloning
item.description: Part of the Techucation Quantum Series. Teleportation is the most over-sold word in quantum computing. It conjures Star Trek transporters and faster-than-light messaging, and almost every popular...

item.title: Embedding Forbidden Text in Spyware to Discourage AI Analysis
item.description: At least one malware developer is adding text about nuclear and biological weapons to their spyware, in an effort to stop automatic AI analysis. Details: The _index.js payload begins with a large...

item.title: Dashboard Design for Incident Response
item.description: Most dashboards answer one question: Is everything okay? During an incident, nobody's asking that. The real question: What broke, where, and what changed? Most dashboards fail at incidents because...

item.title: Who Wins the Variable Fight in Terraform?
item.description: A beginner friendly guide to understanding which value Terraform actually picks when the same variable is set in many places Introduction When you start writing Terraform, you quickly learn that...

item.title: Offshore Development and Bus Factor: Separating the Real Risk From the Stereotype
item.description: There's a common assumption that offshore development inherently raises bus factor risk. The data tells a more precise story, and it's worth getting right, both as someone who might work offshore...

item.title: How I Cut My AI Bill in Half — An Open Source Guide for 2026
item.description: Look, how I Cut My AI Bill in Half — An Open Source Guide for 2026 I never thought I'd write a post defending API aggregators. I've spent years championing fully self-hosted stacks, running my own...

item.title: Trust Is Not a Feature
item.description: Somewhere between the press releases and the product demos, something went quietly wrong with explainable AI. What began as a serious academic and civil liberties concern about algorithmic opacity...

item.title: Building with mini, Part 3/9: Capturing ideas with todo
item.description: In Part 2, pycalc went through its planning interview. A side product you may have noticed: the interview generated ideas we deliberately rejected — Claude itself deferred the ** power operator...

item.title: Do localhost à produção: deployando Worker Services .NET como Windows Service, container Linux e Docker
item.description: Seu Worker Service roda lindamente com F5. Mas "roda na minha máquina" não processa pedido nenhum às 3h da manhã. Em produção, um worker é uma aplicação de longa duração que precisa iniciar...

item.title: Our favorite Prime Day deals you can shop on day two
item.description: Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around,...

item.title: Reciprocal Rank Fusion on free Elasticsearch: licensing, workarounds, and the OpenSearch alternative
item.description: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) on Elasticsearch is gated to the Enterprise tier. On the Basic/free tier, querying with the rrf retriever returns a 403: { "error": { "root_cause": [ { "type":...

item.title: GTA VI finally gets a price tag
item.description: We finally have a price for Grand Theft Auto VI: $79.99. That gets you the standard edition of the game, while the Ultimate Edition will set you back $99.99. Preorders start at midnight tonight,...

item.title: Bob Iger’s Disney wanted Apple, Twitter, and 007
item.description: Bob Iger's tenure as CEO of Disney came to an end a few months ago, after two decades of leading the entertainment giant through some of its most pivotal transformations and acquisitions. Iger, in...

item.title: This flying solar-powered platform could deliver better internet from the air
item.description: As soon as August, a giant silver bullet will cut its way through the dry air of the southwestern US and cross the Pacific to reach the coast of Japan. Once there, the roughly 200-foot-long craft,...

item.title: All challenges big and small
item.description: When I was 18, I skipped my high school graduation and headed to Kuwait. It was 1991, the first Gulf War had just ended, and the country was in complete chaos. There was little to no electricity,...

item.title: DoJ Seizes Huione Cloud Account Tied to Cyber Scam Money Laundering
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DoJ) on Tuesday announced the seizure of a cloud computing account put to use by subsidiaries of Cambodia-based corporate conglomerate HuiOne Group, as the Treasury...

item.title: Cisco Unified CM Flaw Exploited After PoC Reveals File-Write Path to Root
item.description: Threat actors have begun to exploit a recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Unified Communications Manager Session Management...

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than...

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day sale is here, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already...

item.title: India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
item.description: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.

item.title: The Nex Playground is down to its pre-RAMageddon price during Prime Day
item.description: The Nex Playground is the family-centric, Kinect-like game console that made one Verge editor’s kids laugh, cry, and ask for more playtime, even when they were sick. The motion-based game play...

item.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
item.description: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.

item.title: Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
item.description: A new update for Google Home could make it less likely your smart home cameras mistake you for someone else, just because you're facing away from the camera. Starting June 23rd, Google's expanding...

item.title: Hollywood is bending the knee to OpenAI
item.description: Netflix, A24, Focus Features, and Warner Bros.' Clockwork have all reportedly decided to pass on picking up Artificial - director Luca Guadagnino's new biographical drama about OpenAI cofounder /...

item.title: Heads in the game
item.description: The Argentina v. France final of the 2022 Men’s World Cup in Qatar was shaping up to be one of the most epic games in soccer history. With just 12 minutes remaining in the extra time added to the...

item.title: Super Mario is mathier than you think
item.description: Here’s a problem you probably didn’t solve in school: You’re an ambitious young plumber from Brooklyn in a world inhabited by violent human-size mushrooms called Goombas. The love of your life has...

item.title: A man of many words
item.description: Brian Sietsema has a favorite word. It’s somewhat surprising that he can choose just one. He’s the person spellers rely on to confirm pronunciations and answer questions about the roots of the...

item.title: Sharing a love for calculus
item.description: The national conversation about the value of education is currently dominated by speculation about the risks and positive potential of AI. Whatever your own perspective on that debate, I hope...

item.title: Stand Up for Research, Innovation, and Education
